title: Insights into the novel FAD2 gene regulating oleic acid accumulation in peanut seeds with different maturity
author: Zhao, Shuzhen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure S1: GC-MS of fatty acids in transgenic  Arabidopsis . fad2 (nagtive control), WT (positive control), FAD2-7 (WT transformed with AhFAD2-7), pYFAD2-8 (WT transformed with AhFAD2-8) and pYFAD2-9 (WT transformed with AhFAD2-9). C18:1, oleic acid; C18:2, linoleic acid. Table S1: Primers for gene cloning, and qRT-PCR. Table S2: Protein information of new members of FAD2. Table S3: Fatty acid composition of transformed INVSc1. Table S4: Determination of fatty acids in transgenic  Arabidopsis .

C18:1, oleic acid; C18:2, linoleic acid. Table S1: Primers for gene cloning, and qRT-PCR. Table S2: Protein information of new members of FAD2.
